meta.title: I Copied Fern's YouTube Channel With AI *From Scratch*
meta.description:
Learn How To Make 3D Documentary Animations with AI like Fern
3D Animation tool - http://openart.ai/home/?ref=documentary

I found 5 AI tools to recreate Fern style 3d documentary editing  videos from completely scratch. 
In this video I will show you how to write scripts like Fern, How to create AI animations like Fern, How to use AI voice over and how to create AI Thumbnails. What use to cost thousands and hours of your time can now be done in a few hours with AI. 

Tools I used👇
Poppy → Ideation + Scripting ➡️ https://start.getpoppy.ai/dan
OpenArt → Animations ➡️ http://openart.ai/home/?ref=documentary
ElevenLabs → VoiceOver ➡️ https://try.elevenlabs.io/fern
Pikzels → Thumbnails ➡️ https://go.pikzels.com/dan?via=dankieft&fp_sid=11june 

Get My Template & Prompts
Google doc 👉 https://docs.google.com/document/d/19pP4wIqXzxA-YfwpBMihE8ve5yBE3BNjhlxluXo9O1g/edit?usp=sharing

👉My Ai Toolkit - https://dankieft.carrd.co/
My toolkit gives you over 30+ ai tools that I've gathered over the years and use daily. You'll also get access to my free newsletter that educates you about the latest ai tools.

📧 For business inquiries: business@dankieft.com
Follow me on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/dan.kieft/
